baseline.title: Assessment of Environmental Effects (AEE)
baseline.description: Core resource consent report describing the proposal, site context, effects, and mitigation. Usually prepared by a planning consultant with specialist inputs.
baseline.trigger: Required for most resource consent applications under Schedule 4 requirements.

baseline.title: Site Plan, Elevations, and Floor Plans
baseline.description: Scaled plans showing site boundaries, setbacks, existing/proposed buildings, access, and key dimensions. Prepared by an architect or architectural designer.
baseline.trigger: Council requires scaled plans to assess district plan compliance and effects.

baseline.title: Certificate of Title and Legal Description
baseline.description: Current title record identifying ownership, legal boundaries, and encumbrances relevant to consent assessment.
baseline.trigger: Required to identify land status and any relevant legal interests.

residential.title: Residential Neighbourhood Context Assessment
residential.description: Assessment of scale, dominance, privacy, and amenity effects on neighbouring residential properties.
residential.trigger: Residential zones typically require evaluation of amenity and neighbourhood character effects.

commercial.title: Commercial Activity and Servicing Assessment
commercial.description: Assessment of business activity effects including servicing, loading, noise interface, and operating profile.
commercial.trigger: Commercial zones require confirmation that activity effects remain compatible with zone outcomes.

industrial.title: Industrial Reverse Sensitivity Assessment
industrial.description: Assessment of compatibility between sensitive uses and existing/anticipated industrial operations.
industrial.trigger: Industrial zones need assessment of reverse sensitivity and operational effects.

rural.title: Rural Landscape and Servicing Assessment
rural.description: Assessment covering rural amenity, landscape character, and practical servicing/access arrangements.
rural.trigger: Rural zones generally require broader landscape and rural character consideration.

openspace.title: Open Space Interface Assessment
openspace.description: Assessment of how the proposal affects public open-space values, outlook, and recreational function.
openspace.trigger: Open space zones require analysis of effects on public amenity and recreation outcomes.

liquefaction.title: Geotechnical Site Investigation Report
liquefaction.description: Ground investigation and geotechnical interpretation addressing bearing, settlement, and liquefaction behaviour.
liquefaction.trigger: Liquefaction overlay indicates elevated subsoil risk requiring geotechnical verification.

floodHigh.title: Flood Hazard and Floor Level Assessment
floodHigh.description: Hydraulic/flood assessment confirming hazard exposure, minimum floor levels, and mitigation approach.
floodHigh.trigger: High flood hazard overlay requires flood effects and mitigation evidence.

floodPonding.title: Ponding and Surface Water Management Assessment
floodPonding.description: Assessment of local ponding risk and proposed on-site and network stormwater management responses.
floodPonding.trigger: Ponding overlay requires evidence of safe surface water handling.

slopeHazard.title: Slope Stability and Geotechnical Risk Assessment
slopeHazard.description: Specialist report on slope stability, retaining requirements, and construction-stage geotechnical controls.
slopeHazard.trigger: Slope hazard overlay requires confirmation of geotechnical stability.

heritage.title: Heritage Impact Assessment
heritage.description: Specialist assessment of effects on heritage fabric, values, and significance with mitigation methods.
heritage.trigger: Heritage overlay requires assessment of effects on identified heritage values.

heritageChar.title: Heritage Character Assessment
heritageChar.description: Assessment of proposed design against heritage character outcomes and relevant precinct controls.
heritageChar.trigger: Heritage character overlay requires demonstration of compatible form and detailing.

residentialChar.title: Residential Character Assessment
residentialChar.description: Context and urban design assessment showing how built form responds to local character patterns.
residentialChar.trigger: Residential character overlay requires assessment of streetscape and built-form effects.

tsunami.title: Tsunami Hazard and Evacuation Considerations
tsunami.description: Assessment of tsunami hazard exposure and relevant design or emergency planning considerations.
tsunami.trigger: Tsunami overlay indicates coastal hazard exposure requiring specialist confirmation.

coastalErosion.title: Coastal Erosion Risk Assessment
coastalErosion.description: Specialist assessment of erosion susceptibility, setbacks, and long-term risk management.
coastalErosion.trigger: Coastal erosion overlay requires coastal hazard assessment.

coastalInundation.title: Coastal Inundation Assessment
coastalInundation.description: Assessment of inundation pathways, levels, and adaptation/mitigation measures for development.
coastalInundation.trigger: Coastal inundation overlay requires confirmation of exposure and mitigation.

protectedVeg.title: Protected Vegetation Arborist Report
protectedVeg.description: Arboricultural report detailing tree/vegetation condition, root protection areas, and avoidance/mitigation.
protectedVeg.trigger: Protected vegetation overlay requires specialist arboricultural input.

notableTree.title: Notable Tree Assessment and Method Statement
notableTree.description: Detailed arborist report and construction method statement for works within notable tree protection zones.
notableTree.trigger: Notable tree overlay triggers specific protection and assessment requirements.

new_dwelling.title: H1 Energy Efficiency Compliance Statement
new_dwelling.description: Statement and supporting method (Schedule, Calculation, or Modelling) demonstrating NZBC H1 compliance.
new_dwelling.trigger: New dwellings must demonstrate thermal performance compliance.

new_dwelling.title: CCC New Dwelling Application Checklist
new_dwelling.description: Council checklist confirming all required drawings, specifications, and supporting information are included.
new_dwelling.trigger: Council requires complete lodgement information for new dwelling applications.

new_dwelling.title: Daylight and Outlook Assessment (Where Multi-unit Applies)
new_dwelling.description: Assessment of daylight access and outlook compliance for multi-unit or intensified residential forms.
new_dwelling.trigger: Triggered where dwelling form and intensity create potential daylight/outlook effects.

extension.title: Existing vs Proposed Plans and Elevations
extension.description: Comparative drawing package identifying altered elements, new work scope, and compliance impacts.
extension.trigger: Extensions require clear delineation of retained versus new work.

accessory_building.title: Accessory Building Use and Servicing Statement
accessory_building.description: Brief statement confirming intended use, occupancy, services, and consistency with accessory-building controls.
accessory_building.trigger: Accessory buildings need clear use and compliance description.

deck.title: Deck Barrier and Fall Protection Details
deck.description: Design details for barriers/balustrades, heights, openings, and fixings to meet fall prevention requirements.
deck.trigger: Deck proposals require barrier and user-safety details.

deck.title: Structural Engineering for Decks Above 1.5 m
deck.description: Structural design and supporting calculations for elevated decks treated as restricted building work.
deck.trigger: Decks above 1.5 m above ground require structural design and RBW controls.

involvesStructuralWork.title: Record of Building Work (RoBW)
involvesStructuralWork.description: Formal record completed by each LBP carrying out or supervising restricted building work.
involvesStructuralWork.trigger: Required where restricted building work is undertaken by Licensed Building Practitioners.

involvesStructuralWork.title: LBP Licence Details and Scope Confirmation
involvesStructuralWork.description: Details of LBP class, registration, and confirmation that work undertaken matches licensed scope.
involvesStructuralWork.trigger: Council needs confirmation of competent licensed practitioners for RBW.

involvesStructuralWork.title: Producer Statement PS1 (Design)
involvesStructuralWork.description: Design producer statement from structural engineer confirming design intent and compliance basis.
involvesStructuralWork.trigger: Structural work commonly requires PS1 support for engineering design components.

involvesStructuralWork.title: Producer Statement PS3 (Construction Monitoring Commitment)
involvesStructuralWork.description: Commitment from design engineer regarding construction monitoring scope and verification approach.
involvesStructuralWork.trigger: Structural work with engineering design typically requires monitoring commitment.

involvesEarthworks.title: Earthworks Management Plan
involvesEarthworks.description: Plan addressing staging, erosion and sediment controls, stabilisation, and site environmental protection.
involvesEarthworks.trigger: Earthworks activities require documented erosion/sediment and site management controls.
involvesEarthworks.referenceClause: ECan Land and Water Regional Plan

involvesEarthworks.title: Geotechnical Stability Confirmation for Earthworks
involvesEarthworks.description: Geotechnical confirmation of stability where cuts/fills are significant or undertaken on sloping land.
involvesEarthworks.trigger: Earthworks over 50 m3 or on sloping terrain generally require geotechnical confirmation.

involvesEarthworks.title: Environment Canterbury Regional Consent Screening Note
involvesEarthworks.description: Assessment note identifying whether additional ECan earthworks consents are needed near waterways or sensitive areas.
involvesEarthworks.trigger: Earthworks near waterways may trigger separate regional consent requirements.
involvesEarthworks.referenceClause: ECan Land and Water Regional Plan

existingStructureDemolished.title: Hazardous Materials Survey (Including Asbestos Risk)
existingStructureDemolished.description: Survey identifying hazardous materials before demolition, with asbestos assessment emphasis for older buildings.
existingStructureDemolished.trigger: Demolition requires hazardous material risk identification prior to works.
existingStructureDemolished.referenceClause: Health and Safety at Work (Asbestos) Regulations 2016

existingStructureDemolished.title: Demolition Consent Application Documents
existingStructureDemolished.description: Demolition scope, method, safety controls, and sequencing information required for council processing.
existingStructureDemolished.trigger: Existing structure demolition triggers dedicated demolition consent documentation.

existingStructureDemolished.title: Construction and Demolition Waste Management Plan
existingStructureDemolished.description: Plan detailing waste segregation, disposal pathways, and recovery/recycling approach for demolition works.
existingStructureDemolished.trigger: Demolition works require managed waste handling and disposal documentation.

newRoadAccess.title: Vehicle Crossing Application
newRoadAccess.description: Separate council application for new or modified vehicle crossing and kerb/channel works.
newRoadAccess.trigger: New road access requires a CCC vehicle crossing approval pathway.

newRoadAccess.title: Traffic Impact Assessment (Collector/Arterial Roads)
newRoadAccess.description: Assessment of network effects, safety, sightlines, and access design for busier road classifications.
newRoadAccess.trigger: Where access is onto collector/arterial roads, transport effects must be assessed.

water.title: Water Supply Connection Application
water.description: Application package for new or upgraded potable water connection to council network.
water.trigger: New water servicing requires formal council connection application.

water.title: Water Network Capacity Confirmation
water.description: Evidence of available network capacity and servicing constraints for proposed demand.
water.trigger: Council requires confirmation that network can service proposal demand.

wastewater.title: Wastewater Connection Application
wastewater.description: Application and design information for connection to public wastewater infrastructure.
wastewater.trigger: New wastewater discharge connection requires council approval documentation.

wastewater.title: Trade Waste Screening Note (Commercial Uses)
wastewater.description: Statement identifying whether trade waste consent is required for non-domestic discharge.
wastewater.trigger: Commercial/industrial wastewater proposals may require trade waste assessment.

stormwater.title: Stormwater Management Plan
stormwater.description: Plan showing collection, attenuation, treatment, and lawful discharge pathway for stormwater.
stormwater.trigger: New stormwater connections require documented management and discharge design.

stormwater.title: Stormwater Connection Application
stormwater.description: Council application for physical stormwater tie-in, including levels and discharge details.
stormwater.trigger: Formal council approval is required for stormwater network connections.

floorAreaOver100m2.title: Producer Statement PS2 (Peer Review) Recommendation
floorAreaOver100m2.description: Independent peer review statement for structural design, commonly requested on larger structural scopes.
floorAreaOver100m2.trigger: Floor area over 100 m2 with structural scope typically warrants engineering peer review.

floorAreaOver300m2.title: Integrated Fire and Egress Strategy Note
floorAreaOver300m2.description: Higher-level note confirming fire safety strategy, occupancy assumptions, and egress implications for larger developments.
floorAreaOver300m2.trigger: Large floor area developments may require integrated fire strategy documentation.

constructionValueOver500k.title: Quantity Surveyor Cost Estimate
constructionValueOver500k.description: Professionally prepared construction cost estimate supporting consent valuation and fee calculation.
constructionValueOver500k.trigger: Higher-value projects commonly require robust cost evidence for processing.

constructionValueOver2m.title: Construction Staging and Management Plan
constructionValueOver2m.description: Comprehensive staging and construction management plan covering logistics, safety, nuisance, and programme controls.
constructionValueOver2m.trigger: Major-value projects generally require detailed construction management planning.
